text: Not a single animal with wings is an aquatic mammal. Anything that is an aquatic mammal is a fish. It is necessarily true that no fish are animals with wings.

premise1.subject: animal with wings
premise1.raw_text: Not a single animal with wings is an aquatic mammal

premise2.subject: aquatic mammal
premise2.raw_text: Anything that is an aquatic mammal is a fish

conclusion.subject: fish
conclusion.raw_text: It is necessarily true that no fish are animals with wings
